description_long: This armchair features a sleek, mid-century modern design with a solid wooden frame and gently curved armrests. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric, providing a soft and inviting appearance. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ergonomic support for the user. The armrests are crafted from polished wood, seamlessly integrated into the frame, and exhibit a gentle curve for comfort. The legs are angled and made of the same wood as the armrests, giving the chair a sturdy yet elegant stance. The overall look is minimalist, with clean lines and a harmonious blend of wood and fabric.
description: A mid-century modern armchair with a light gray upholstered seat and backrest, set in a polished wooden frame with curved armrests and angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, slightly reclined backrest and wide seat cushion framed by curved wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angled backrest, the continuous wooden frame, and the ergonomic slope of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height of the backrest and the wooden frame encasing the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angled backrest, seat, and the elegant wooden armrest and leg structure.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, and slightly reclined with smooth upholstery
attribute_leg_type: angled wooden legs integrated with the frame
